init.description: Define time-of-use tariff windows as YAML. Any hour not matching a window falls into the 'default' tariff. Per-tariff statistics are emitted as southern_company:energy_usage_<tariff>_<account> and southern_company:energy_cost_<tariff>_<account>. Changing tariff names starts fresh statistic buckets — existing history is not re-bucketed. Leave blank to disable per-tariff statistics.

error.invalid_schema: Schema is invalid — each entry needs a name, days (0-6), start_hour, end_hour
error.bad_hours: start_hour must be less than end_hour, both within 0-24
